event_comments:
Reviewed newsletter canonicalization follow-up 2026-03-21 merged duplicate event c6c80d22-c4de-5952-8afd-7dbe11149c8b ("Seward Park, Seattle. WIOL Champs"). Reason: rollover duplicate. Notes: The November 1995 issue scheduled the Feb. 24 WIOL championships event for 1996, not 1995, and the same event was later re-ingested from 1996-01.

Reviewed newsletter canonicalization wave 2026-03-21 (1994/1996 deep review) updated canonical event metadata. Reason: The Feb. 24, 1996 Seward Park event is the actual 1996 WIOL Championships.
